content:
Today, I went to Hub Hall, another food hall, over by The Garden and North Station.

https://www.hubhallboston.com

https://maps.app.goo.gl/9bGe2xV3rxJCwvDM9

Seems like a totally viable place to meet if people want more downtown (and sports) energy.

It was a bit crowded today but there was a Celtics game going on. :basketball:
